name: Coconut Lemon Fillng
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 2 cups water, lemon juice, salt, and 1 cup sugar. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Gradually add 1 cup water mixed with flour, stirring until smooth.
3. Add the smooth mixture to the boiling ingredients, stirring constantly.
4. Cook for 5 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks with 1/2 cup sugar. Slowly add to the lemon mixture and cook for 2 minutes.
6. Stir in lemon rind and butter until combined.
7. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before using.
8. Spread filling between layers of cake and on top and sides of a 9-inch layer cake.
9. Sprinkle shredded coconut generously on the sides of the cake.
10. Decorate the top of the cake with a 1-inch border of shredded coconut.
